name: Băieți de oraș
overview: Băieți de oraș is a TV series created by Mihai Bendeac. He exposes the lives of 4 teenagers: Roby Roberto, Malone, Robotzelu and Dorian. In this series, besides the protagonists, there were also famous actors from Romanian cinemas such as Rodica Popescu Bitănescu or Carmen Tănase. The intro song of the series is composed and performed by the Romanian rapper Cheloo. The Băieți de oraș comedy series is one of the most watched TV series in Romania.

trailers.title: Top 5 cele mai AMUZANTE momente cu Malone! 😂
